name: canva-linux
description: A community open-source desktop wrapper for use with Canva
author: Community

scripts.dist:appimage: npm run build:runtime && NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation electron-builder --linux AppImage --publish=never
scripts.build:scripts: esbuild scripts/build-runtime.ts scripts/build-preload-bundle.ts scripts/copy-runtime-assets.ts scripts/clean-runtime-build.ts scripts/run-node-tests.ts scripts/run-c420ui.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --external:electron --external:blessed --external:esbuild --external:typescript --outdir=.build/scripts --entry-names=[name]
scripts.test: CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD npm run build:scripts && CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD node .build/scripts/run-node-tests.js
scripts.build:preload: CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD npm run build:scripts && CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD node .build/scripts/build-preload-bundle.js
scripts.clean:runtime: CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD npm run build:scripts && CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD node .build/scripts/clean-runtime-build.js
scripts.build:runtime: CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD npm run build:scripts && CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD node .build/scripts/build-runtime.js
scripts.build:scripts-core: esbuild scripts/core/action-registry.ts scripts/core/action-runner.ts scripts/core/validate-actions.ts scripts/core/overview-status.ts scripts/core/check-ai-guardrails.ts scripts/core/check-no-shell-menu.ts scripts/core/check-sudo-contract.ts scripts/core/check-no-root-launch-contract.ts scripts/core/check-c420ui-settings-contract.ts scripts/core/check-tool-logging-contract.ts scripts/core/check-log-selection-contract.ts scripts/core/check-c420ui-header-layout.ts scripts/core/check-c420ui-branding.ts scripts/core/check-c420ui-project-boundary.ts scripts/core/check-action-contract.ts scripts/core/check-detection-contract.ts scripts/core/check-version-consistency.ts scripts/core/check-release-contract.ts scripts/core/check-review-checklist.ts scripts/core/check-shell-action-ids.ts scripts/core/check-doc-links.ts scripts/core/check-dependency-policy.ts scripts/core/check-runtime-build.ts scripts/core/check-typescript-wrapper-contract.ts scripts/core/check-typescript-first.ts scripts/core/check-gitignore-policy.ts scripts/core/check-no-source-javascript.ts scripts/core/check-source-integrity.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outdir=.build/scripts/core
scripts.check:scripts-core: npm run check:c420ui-core && npm run check:canva-linux && npm run check:shared-tooling && npm run check:legacy-tooling
scripts.c420ui: CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD npm run build:scripts && CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD node .build/scripts/run-c420ui.js
scripts.check:c420ui: CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD npm run build:scripts && CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD node .build/scripts/run-c420ui.js --help
scripts.build:c420ui-contract-checks: npm run build:c420ui-checks && npm run build:canva-linux-checks
scripts.check:c420ui-contracts: npm run check:c420ui-core && npm run check:canva-linux
scripts.check:c420ui-core: npm run build:c420ui-checks && node .build/packages/c420ui/checks/check-c420ui-boundary.js && node .build/packages/c420ui/checks/check-c420ui-bridge-contract.js && node .build/packages/c420ui/checks/check-c420ui-artifact-workflow-contract.js && node .build/packages/c420ui/checks/check-c420ui-action-engine-contract.js && node .build/packages/c420ui/checks/check-c420ui-naming.js && node .build/packages/c420ui/checks/check-c420ui-package-policy.js
scripts.check:canva-linux: npm run build:canva-linux-checks && node .build/scripts/checks/canva-linux/check-canva-linux-adapter-contract.js && node .build/scripts/checks/canva-linux/check-canva-linux-artifact-recipes.js && node .build/scripts/checks/canva-linux/check-canva-linux-appimage-contract.js && node .build/scripts/checks/canva-linux/check-canva-linux-flatpak-contract.js && node .build/scripts/checks/canva-linux/check-canva-linux-release-artifacts.js
scripts.check:shared-tooling: npm run build:runtime && npm run build:scripts-core && node .build/scripts/core/check-ai-guardrails.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-doc-links.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-dependency-policy.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-runtime-build.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-typescript-wrapper-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-typescript-first.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-gitignore-policy.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-no-source-javascript.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-source-integrity.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-review-checklist.js
scripts.check:legacy-tooling: npm run build:scripts-core && node .build/scripts/core/validate-actions.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-no-shell-menu.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-sudo-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-no-root-launch-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-c420ui-settings-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-tool-logging-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-log-selection-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-c420ui-header-layout.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-c420ui-branding.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-c420ui-project-boundary.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-action-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-detection-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-version-consistency.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-release-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-shell-action-ids.js
